global_rules.grain_overlay: A fixed full-screen SVG noise overlay must be present across all dimensions, opacity varying by theme (0.04 for Light themes, 0.08 for Dark themes). Pointer-events: none.
global_rules.custom_cursor: Implement a global custom cursor using framer-motion that morphs based on the active dimension.
global_rules.navigation: A sticky 'world-switcher' navigation pill at the bottom center or top right of the screen, revealing current dimension and allowing fast switching.

layout.structure: Immersive full-screen flex/grid. Avatar centrally or offset. 3 portal cards appearing on hover or scroll.
layout.components: Custom HTML/Tailwind portal cards with backdrop-blur and 1px white/10 borders.

motion.entrance: Slow cinematic fade in, subtle zoom out of avatar.
motion.interactions: Portal cards expand on hover, others dim. Cinematic text reveal.
motion.cursor: Small white dot with trailing glow.

layout.structure: Control Room Grid. Bento-style layout for experience, projects, education, and skills.
layout.spacing: Tight gaps (gap-4, gap-6). Visible 1px borders forming a structural grid.
layout.components: Shadcn Badges (skills), Card (projects), separated timeline lists.

motion.interactions: Data-grid lines drawing in on scroll. Hover states use 1px solid cyan borders.

content_mapping.role: Senior Data Analyst at EY (Dec 2024 - Present)

layout.structure: Asymmetric, journal-like overlapping images and text blocks.
layout.components: Soft rounded custom cards (max 8px radius) for hobbies. Subtle drop shadows.

motion.entrance: Soft slow fades, gentle parallax on images.
motion.interactions: Organic floating hover effects on hobby cards.
motion.cursor: Soft blurred circle, warm ochre tint.

content_mapping.quote: I feel most alive when the people I love are okay.

typography.heading: Playfair Display, serif (italicized, elegant)
typography.accent: Spectral, serif (uppercase tracking-widest for dates/subtle markers)

layout.structure: Single column, extremely narrow max-width (max-w-2xl) for reading focus. Massive vertical padding.
layout.spacing: Huge vertical margins (my-32) between paragraphs to enforce slow reading.
layout.components: No cards. Pure typography. Custom letter-unfolding animation container.

motion.interactions: Letter-unfolding: Paragraphs reveal sequentially on scroll. Soft candlelight amber glow follows the text being read.

layout.structure: A4 proportion container, strictly left-aligned, highly scannable.
layout.spacing: Standard padding (p-8), clear visual hierarchy with Separators.
layout.components: Shadcn Button (Download Resume), Shadcn Separator, clean lists.

motion.interactions: Standard crisp hover states on buttons/links.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required fonts from Google Fonts: Cormorant Garamond, Outfit, JetBrains Mono, Lora, Caveat, Playfair Display, Spectral, Cabinet Grotesk, IBM Plex Sans.
Global layout must include the fixed noise overlay and the custom cursor logic.
The world-switcher pill should be accessible in /professional, /personal, and /emotional, but hidden in /recruiter.
FastAPI backend must expose an endpoint (e.g., /api/resume/download) serving the ATS-friendly PDF.
Use Framer Motion heavily for the gateway interactions and the letter-unfolding in the Emotional route.
